description: Recto: Upper right corner of a letter with a Hebrew header and then beginning אצדרת הדה אלמכאתבה אלי מ . . . . Reused on verso and in the margins of recto for lists of names paired with numbers (distribution list?) in a hand that looks like that of Yehuda b. Ṭuviyyahu.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
